Package com.stardevllc.starlib.registry

Class Registry<K extends Comparable<K>,V>

java.lang.Object
com.stardevllc.starlib.registry.Registry<K,V>
All Implemented Interfaces:
Iterable<V>, Map<K,V>, SequencedMap<K,V>, SortedMap<K,V>
Direct Known Subclasses:
IntegerRegistry, LongRegistry, StringRegistry, UUIDRegistry
public class Registry<K extends Comparable<K>,V> extends Object implements Iterable<V>, SortedMap<K,V>
